name: Netflix Cookies
description: Access Netflix with various cookie types including HD, UHD, TP, and more.
long_description:
🍿 Netflix Cookies (No replacement or warranty)
- HD: Basic quality account.
- UHD: Ultra HD support.
- Country-Based: Geo-specific access.
- TP: Third-party billing accounts.
- EM Specific: Email-based purchased access.

name: Freepik Cookies
description: Freepik is an ai platform for designers to design and create images, video vectors, and more.
long_description:
🖼️ Freepik Cookies
- Normal: Basic access.
- Credit Points: Access with credit points.
price:
- Credit less than 10k: $0.50
- Credit more than 10k: $0.80
- Credit more than 15k: $1
- Credit more than 20k: $1.50
- Credit more than 25k: $2
requirements: After that per 10k credit will be 0.50$.

price:

name: Spotify Cookies
description: Get mixed and country-specific Spotify cookies for premium access.
long_description:
🎵 Spotify Cookies
- Mixed: Non-region locked Spotify access.
- Country-Based: Country-specific premium access.

name: Jio Hotstar Cookies
description: Hotstar cookies available in mixed regions and specific plans.
long_description:
📺 Hotstar Cookies

- Specific: Plan or duration-based cookies.
requirements:

✅ Specific plan or duration-based cookies.

name: Prime Video Cookies

long_description:

name: Surfshark Cookies
